name: Build a Calculator Module
description: Create a Python module `calculator.py` with functions: add(a, b), subtract(a, b), multiply(a, b), divide(a, b). Division by zero should raise ValueError with a clear message. Also create `test_calculator.py` with pytest tests covering: normal operations for all four functions, division by zero, negative numbers, and floating point inputs. All tests must pass. Use only the standard library plus pytest.
expected_outcomes: calculator.py exists with add, subtract, multiply, divide functions
